# JRNG UI

> JRNG UI is a modern Angular component library for admin panels, dashboards and business applications.

Package: jrng-ui
Documentation: https://jrngui.dev/
Getting started: https://jrngui.dev/docs
Public API index: https://jrngui.dev/docs/index
Components: https://jrngui.dev/docs/components
Guides: https://jrngui.dev/guides
Examples: https://jrngui.dev/examples
Registry: https://jrngui.dev/registry/registry.json
Registry schema: https://jrngui.dev/registry/schema.json
Source: https://github.com/gokujy/jrng-ui

Compatibility: JRNG UI 0.1.0 is verified with Angular 21.2.x.
Imports: use modular public entrypoints such as jrng-ui/button.
Styles: load jrng-ui/styles once.
Button activation: use (onClick).
Architecture: standalone components, SSR-safe behavior, zoneless-friendly state, semantic theme tokens, and accessible keyboard/focus behavior.
